General Talent.Case-Hardened: You take 3% less damage from all sources

Class Talent.Brawler's Sense: You take 5% less damage from enemies within 200m
Class Talent.Fast Reflexes: Boosts primary and secondary stats of Movement gear by 5%
Class Talent.Gun Nut: Your shotguns and special weapons deal 4% more damage
Class Talent.Hotwired Defenses: Boosts primary and secondary stats of Defense gear by 5%
Class Talent.Master Gunner: Artillery and sniper weapons deal 4% more damage
Class Talent.Maximizer: For every 100.000 total damage you deal, instantly regenerates 30% of shield
Class Talent.Offensive Tactics: Boosts primary and secondary stats of Attack gear by 5%
Class Talent.On Target: Autocannons and shotguns deal 4% more damage
Class Talent.Rocketeer: Your autocannons and rocket launchers deal 4% more damage

Personality Talent.Air Warrior: If you are in the air for more than 1s, deal 5% more damage against armor
Personality Talent.Backup Plan: Whenever all your gear is on cooldown, activates a 20.000 shield for 10s
Personality Talent.Chemical Hazard: All corrosive and fire effects deal 15% more damage and last 15% longer
Personality Talent.Crack Shot: Whenever enemy hits your undamaged module, take 10% less damage for 5s
Personality Talent.Deadeye: After destroying a foe from at least 300m, your weapons reload 30% faster
Personality Talent.Fearless: Your weapons deal 6% more damage against enemies within 100m
Personality Talent.Fire Support: If two or more allies are within 100m, your weapons deal 7% more damage
Personality Talent.Fuel Thief: Hitting an enemy that has not damaged you in the last 10s restores 5 fuel units fuel. Cooldown 10s
Personality Talent.Gas Guzzler: If no enemies are within 200m, fuel regenerates faster by 20%
Personality Talent.Gear Resonator: Using any gear reduces incoming damage by 7% for 5s
Personality Talent.Hellraiser: Destroying enemies boosts your blast damage by 15% for 10s
Personality Talent.Improviser: After your module armor drops below 30%, get 10.000 shield. Can activate once per module
Personality Talent.It Takes Two: Assists boost your speed and mobility by 15% for 5s
Personality Talent.Parasite Protocol: Every kill increases a random parameter of your core gear by 8%
Personality Talent.Reactive Rage: If any of your modules is missing more than 50% of armor, your weapons deal 6% more damage
Personality Talent.Scavenger: Destroying an enemy refills up to 30% of your ammunition
Personality Talent.Synergist: Assists reduce cooldowns of your gear by 20%
Personality Talent.Vanguard: If two or more allies are within 100m, boosts all of your gear's primary stats by 10% for 20s

Dominion Talent.Bio Repair: Whenever you lose shields, a random module regenerates 4.000 armor per second for 2s
Dominion Talent.Charge Loop: Using any gear charges up your cycle gear by 30 points
Dominion Talent.Closing the Deal: If your team has more kills than the enemy, your weapons reload faster by 6%
Dominion Talent.Damage Cascade: If enemy Robot has more than 6 modules, you deal 1% extra weapon damage for every module past the sixth
Dominion Talent.Gear Hacker: Boosts all your gear damage by 4%
Dominion Talent.Quick Reflexes: Activating any defensive gear reduces shield cooldown by 25% for 15s
Dominion Talent.Red Alert: Taking damage speeds up your weapon reload by 7% every 5s
Dominion Talent.Survival Instinct: If any module has less than 30% of armor, you take 10% less damage from all sources
Dominion Talent.Titan Summoner: Every assist or kill grants you extra 30 Titan points

Ace Talent.Afterparty: Each kill triggers a brief celebratory fireworks effect.
Ace Talent.Blood Lust: If any enemy is within 200m, increases rate of fire by 7%
Ace Talent.Bullet-catcher: If any enemy is within 100m, you take 8% less damage
Ace Talent.Deflector Gizmo: After losing shields, reflects 30% of damage back at the enemy for 5s. Cooldown 10s
Ace Talent.Field Repairs: Using Support gear restores 4.000 armor to all damaged modules
Ace Talent.Fragments Synergy: Assists increase Primary & Secondary parameters of your Core Gear by 10% for 15s. Stacks up to 4 times.
Ace Talent.Free Acceleration: "Dash Thrusters" and "Pneumatic Vault" are used without spending fuel. Cooldown 15s.
Ace Talent.Frontliner: Activating any gear speeds you up by 20%
Ace Talent.Ghost Visor: Enemies that hit your mech become Marked: revealed and take 4% more damage for 6s. Cooldown of 16s.
Ace Talent.Press the Attack: Damaging an enemy with your gear boosts rate of fire by 20% for 7s
Ace Talent.Prizefighter: Destroying an enemy within 150m restores 7.500 armor to all modules
Ace Talent.Ricochet: Dealing direct damage has a 10% chance to hit all of the target's modules at once
Ace Talent.Sharpshooter: Artillery and sniper weapons have a 15% chance to deal 50% more damage
Ace Talent.Siege Tower: Staying still for 3s adds 40.000 to your shields. Cancels on movement
Ace Talent.Trickster's Triumph: Pushing enemy's module into critical state regenerates 20% of your shield
Ace Talent.Well-timed: Staying still for 3s boosts your weapon damage by 7%. Cancels on movement
